early_bird.title: Early Bird 20% OFF
early_bird.desc: Book 30 days in advance and enjoy 20% off on all room types. Valid all season.
conditions: Book at least 30 days in advance
early_bird.hint: Check-in must be at least 30 days from today.

family.title: Family Package 15% OFF
family.desc: The ideal family getaway! Get 15% off when booking Family or Suite rooms for 4+ guests.
family.hint: Offer applies to Family rooms. The rooms page will filter accordingly.

spa.title: Free Spa Session
spa.desc: Enjoy a complimentary $50 spa session when booking Deluxe or above. Pure relaxation included.
spa.hint: Choose Deluxe or above to receive the free spa offer.

weekend.title: Weekend Package
weekend.desc: Check-in Friday, check-out Sunday — get 10% OFF and complimentary buffet breakfast for 2.
weekend.hint: Check-in must be Friday, check-out must be Sunday.

honeymoon.title: Honeymoon Package
honeymoon.desc: Special offer for couples: 25% OFF + room decoration + champagne + romantic dinner.
honeymoon.hint: Minimum 2 nights. The rooms page will filter Suite rooms for you.

gym.title: Free Gym & Yoga
gym.desc: Unlimited access to the Gym and Yoga classes for stays of 3 nights or more.
gym.hint: Stay at least 3 nights to enjoy free Gym & Yoga access.

validation.minNights: This offer requires a minimum of {{n}} nights.
validation.minDays: Must be booked at least {{n}} days in advance.
validation.weekendOnly: Check-in must be on a Friday.
validation.checkoutSunday: Check-out must be on a Sunday.
